parameters.query: SELECT l.id AS launch_id, l.user_id, l.launch_name, l.product_name, l.competitor_names, l.competitor_ids, l.target_launch_date, (l.target_launch_date - CURRENT_DATE) AS days_until_launch, l.readiness_score FROM launch.launches l WHERE l.phase = 'pre_launch' AND l.target_launch_date > CURRENT_DATE;

SELECT s.signal_type, s.company_name, s.title, s.summary, s.created_at FROM control_plane.signals s WHERE s.user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid AND s.company_name = ANY(ARRAY[{{ $json.competitor_names ? $json.competitor_names.map(n => "'" + n.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'").join(',') : "''" }}]) AND s.created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY s.created_at DESC LIMIT 30;

INSERT INTO launch.readiness_checks (launch_id, check_date, score, competitor_landscape_score, messaging_readiness_score, market_timing_score, objection_coverage_score, battlecard_freshness_score, risk_factors, opportunities, recommendations) VALUES ('{{ $json.launch_id }}'::uuid, CURRENT_DATE, {{ $json.overall_score }}, {{ $json.competitor_landscape }}, {{ $json.messaging_readiness }}, {{ $json.market_timing }}, {{ $json.objection_coverage }}, {{ $json.battlecard_freshness }}, '{{ $json.risks_json }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json.opportunities_json }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json.recommendations_json }}'::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (launch_id, check_date) DO UPDATE SET score = EXCLUDED.score, competitor_landscape_score = EXCLUDED.competitor_landscape_score, messaging_readiness_score = EXCLUDED.messaging_readiness_score, market_timing_score = EXCLUDED.market_timing_score, objection_coverage_score = EXCLUDED.objection_coverage_score, battlecard_freshness_score = EXCLUDED.battlecard_freshness_score, risk_factors = EXCLUDED.risk_factors, opportunities = EXCLUDED.opportunities, recommendations = EXCLUDED.recommendations;

INSERT INTO launch.briefs (launch_id, brief_type, brief_date, title, content_json, content_md, signal_count, days_to_launch) VALUES ('{{ $('Build Intelligence Brief').first().json.launch_id }}'::uuid, 'intelligence', CURRENT_DATE, '{{ $('Build Intelligence Brief').first().json.brief_title }}', '{{ $('Build Intelligence Brief').first().json.brief_json }}'::jsonb, '{{ $('Build Intelligence Brief').first().json.brief_md.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', {{ $('Build Intelligence Brief').first().json.signal_count }}, {{ $('Build Intelligence Brief').first().json.days_until_launch }});

UPDATE launch.launches SET readiness_score = {{ $json.overall_score }}, readiness_breakdown = '{{ JSON.stringify({ competitor_landscape: $json.competitor_landscape, messaging_readiness: $json.messaging_readiness, market_timing: $json.market_timing, objection_coverage: $json.objection_coverage, battlecard_freshness: $json.battlecard_freshness }) }}'::jsonb, updated_at = now() WHERE id = '{{ $json.launch_id }}'::uuid;
